name: Technology Cadet
description: First entry badge for visitors and new Student Technology Corps members.

name: Cable Runner
description: Trace, label, and document a physical connection.

name: Switch Initiate
description: Console into a switch and verify baseline information.

name: VLAN Operator
description: Create, verify, and explain a segmented network path.

name: DHCP Defender
description: Validate addressing and troubleshoot a DHCP issue.

name: Linux Launch Crew
description: Deploy or validate a Linux VM or service.

name: Windows Domain Builder
description: Build or administer an Active Directory training pod.

name: Help Desk Hero
description: Resolve and document a simulated ACE Service Desk ticket.

name: Cyber Range Scout
description: Explore a safe cyber range target and document findings.

name: Firewall Guardian
description: Verify a firewall path, rule, zone, or staging task.

name: Mission Control Operator
description: Run a mission briefing, status check, or operations handoff.
